questions: Does the CLI have any involvement in library credential routing that needs technical direction?

answers.answer: No. The CLI provides ticket management commands but has no library repo creation or credential routing logic. The collateral merge conflict in src/tickets/index.ts (HLX-342 CLI improvements vs staging) is already resolved with both sides preserved.
evidence: Grep scan of src/tickets/index.ts: zero conflict markers
CLI diagnosis: 'collateral conflict — the CLI has no involvement in library credential routing'
No library credential logic exists in the CLI codebase

statement: The CLI has no involvement in library credential routing. The collateral merge conflict in src/tickets/index.ts is already resolved. No code changes or technical direction needed for the CLI.
